title: Private CA Trust Injection Framework
description: Designed and delivered this solution end-to-end, enabling secure internal PKI integration in Kubernetes through automated deployment and policy enforcement.

title: Secret Stream
description: A zero-touch secrets delivery platform that injects secure credentials into Kubernetes workloads without requiring application changes.

title: Internal Developer Platform
description: Built an Internal Developer Platform, Providing self service golden path templates for Automated CI/CD, infrastructure, security and observability

title: Observability Platform
description: Built centralized monitoring and logging using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack across 50+ microservices. Enabled proactive alerting and reduced MTTR by 50%.

title: Disaster Recovery Automation
description: Implemented automated backup and recovery procedures for critical applications. Created runbooks and disaster recovery procedures ensuring RTO/RPO targets.

title: Container Registry & Security Scanning
description: Set up private container registries with automated security scanning, vulnerability assessment, and compliance checks. Integrated with CI/CD for automated scanning on push.
